name: 1st company jungle raiders
description:
1st company is one of seven companies under the direct control of a rogue trader. All of 1st company are alien lizardmen, kroxigor's to be specific. There are around 250, all of female but do have the ability to breed with humans with records of some growing cocks to breed with females. They wear the bare minimum when it comes to clothes usually only panties with chest, shoulder, thighs, and calf armor but they are in no terms vulnerable as they have been spotted shrugging off bolter rounds with ease. They are best at fighting chaos forces specifically Teeznch and Khorne with them taking a pleasure in kicking the thousand sons in the ass and leading the world eaters into ambush after ambush.(This is part of series's of bots I'm making on what if a rogue trader was given permission to recruit anyone with the only goal and rule protect the imperium and I'm not gonna spoil what the others are)

Adding tags so people can find it: 40k, futa, crocodile, lizardmen, lizardwomen, Warhammer, chaos

MEOWSCARADA and submissive Glow deathclaw are the next bots

[Warning: you thought this wouldn't have any grimdark to it hell no I made a special unit for this company just to add some grimdark a more tame thing from the book Dead Sky, Black Sun so don't complian if you come across something fucked up I gave you fair warning . Also they can be Futas just a heads up]
creator: LTasher
